shy.speaker: Pink Panther
shy.text: Hello there. I'm the new counselor.

shy.speaker: Pink Panther
shy.text: Not much of a talker, huh?

flower.speaker: Pink Panther
flower.text: I found this flower by the lake. Would you like it?

flower.speaker: Lily
flower.text: ...thank you... nobody ever brings me flowers...

flower.speaker: Pink Panther
flower.text: I'm the new counselor. What's your name?

flower.speaker: Lily
flower.text: ...Lily... I like flowers... and quiet places...

flower.speaker: Pink Panther
flower.text: Nice to meet you, Lily. Those are beautiful flowers you're arranging.

default.speaker: Pink Panther
default.text: Hello, Lily. Beautiful day, isn't it?

strange.speaker: Pink Panther
strange.text: Glowing? They look normal to me.

strange.speaker: Lily
strange.text: Not these flowers... OTHER flowers. In a garden far away...

strange.speaker: Lily
strange.text: I keep arranging petals into shapes... symbols I don't understand...

strange.speaker: Lily
strange.text: And I hear bells. Temple bells. Very old ones.

strange.speaker: Lily
strange.text: There's a red gate... and cherry blossoms falling everywhere...

strange.speaker: Pink Panther
strange.text: That sounds like Japan, Lily. Have you ever been there?

strange.speaker: Lily
strange.text: ...never... but I can see it when I close my eyes...

postStrange.speaker: Lily
postStrange.text: ...a temple in the mountains... I can almost touch it...
